---
title: "NHL"
subtitle: "Hockey data ingestion and grade reports"
---

## Season Grade Reports

Each report below is a self-contained R/Quarto template — open the `.qmd` source, change the team/player/season in the settings block at the top, and re-render to generate a new report.

- [Team Grade Report](hockey_scripts/grade_nhl_team.html) — defaults to the Boston Bruins, 2024-25
- [Player Grade Report](hockey_scripts/grade_nhl_player.html) — defaults to Nathan MacKinnon, 2024-25

## Data Ingestion

Team and player season data is pulled via the `hockeyR` package:

- `hockey_scripts/01_ingest_nhl_team.R`
- `hockey_scripts/02_ingest_nhl_player.R`
